title: kalmiella hirsuta
intro: Kalmiella hirsuta is a flowering plant species in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to the Western Ghats of India and is also known as the hairy Kalmiella. The medicinal properties of Kalmiella hirsuta include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of the plant include its use in treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, with herbal preparations like decoctions and infusions being used to harness its medicinal properties.
